name: voitta-enterprise
description: Voitta Enterprise portal plugin — enterprise.voitta.ai branding plus the voitta-rag-enterprise MCP integration.

fields.label: API key
fields.help: One key per server — mint each in that instance's SPA → Settings → API keys. Blank is fine for local-dev modes (VOITTA_SINGLE_USER / VOITTA_DEV_USER). The server URL is derived from the page host ({host}/mcp) — no URL to configure.
